title: Notifications.
loadError: Could not load notifications. Please try again.
emptyDesc: When points are calculated, a deadline approaches, or you climb the ranking, you'll see them here.

exact.0: Exact score on {home} - {away}! You earned {points} points, keep it up 🎯
exact.1: You nailed the {home} - {away} score! +{points} points for you 🔥
exact.2: Spot on for {home} - {away}! You got the exact score and earned {points} points.

winner.0: {home} - {away} is over. You picked the winner and earned {points} points.
winner.2: {home} - {away} ended and you earned {points} points for the right winner.

miss.0: {home} - {away} is over. No points this time — get them next round!
miss.1: {home} - {away} ended and you missed it. Time for redemption 💪
miss.2: {home} - {away} is done. Nothing this time, but there's plenty left to play.

points.0: You earned {points} points today! You're now #{position} in the ranking.
points.1: Good day: +{points} points. You're #{position} in the global ranking.
points.2: You closed the day with {points} points and you're #{position} in the ranking.

pointsNoRank.0: You earned {points} points today! Keep predicting to enter the ranking.
pointsNoRank.1: Good day: +{points} points. Time to climb the ranking!

zero.0: No points today. You're #{position} in the ranking.
zero.1: A scoreless day for you. You're still #{position} in the ranking.

zeroNoRank.0: No points today. Predict the next round to climb the ranking!
zeroNoRank.1: A scoreless round. The next one is your chance to bounce back.
